summary: Tested TOTP security features and Inventory Correction. All 27 backend tests pass after fixing a critical 500 error in /api/auth/verify-admin-action. All frontend features confirmed working: Security tab, TOTP setup flow (QR code), TOTP controls (9 actions, save), Inventory Correction (collapsible section, admin direct mode, correction history).

critical.issue: 500 Internal Server Error when context was a plain string. create_pin_notification() called context.get() on a str. FIXED: notifications.py now normalizes string contexts to dict.

security_tab_admin_only.notes: Security tab only visible for admin role (owner). Non-admin users won't see it.

totp_setup_card_not_set_up.notes: TOTP card shows 'Not Set Up' badge. 'Set Up Now' button visible.

totp_setup_qr_flow.notes: Clicking 'Set Up Now' calls /api/auth/totp/setup, shows QR code (qrcode.react SVG), manual secret code, and 'Next — Enter Code' button. Confirm step shows TOTP input (disabled until 6 chars). Status stays enabled=false until verified.

totp_protected_actions_9_toggles.notes: 9 action toggles found grouped by module (Inventory, Daily Operations, Sales, Products, Purchase Orders, Settings). Toggle states persist visually. Save button calls PUT /settings/totp-controls.

totp_controls_save.notes: Toggling an action and clicking Save shows 'TOTP controls saved' toast. Backend confirms persistence via GET.

inventory_correction_section.notes: Edit dialog for non-repack products shows collapsible 'Inventory Correction' section with 'Current: {stock}' badge.

correction_branch_required.notes: When 'All Branches' selected, inputs are disabled with warning message. When specific branch selected, inputs enable and show current stock.

correction_admin_direct_mode.notes: Admin (owner role) applies correction without TOTP dialog. No TotpVerifyDialog appears. submitCorrection called with auth_mode='direct_admin'. Inputs reset after success.

correction_history.notes: Recent Corrections section loads from /api/inventory/corrections/{product_id}. Shows old→new quantities, reason, performer name, auth mode icon (👤 Admin / 🔐 TOTP / 🔑 PW).

correction_repack_blocked.notes: Repack products do NOT show the Inventory Correction section (editing.is_repack check). Backend also returns 400 for repack adjustment attempts.

totp_status_endpoint.notes: GET /api/auth/totp/status returns {enabled: false, verified: false} initially. Requires admin role.

verify_admin_action_password_mode.notes: POST /api/auth/verify-admin-action with mode='password' and correct admin password returns {valid: true, manager_name, mode_used: 'password'}. Wrong password returns {valid: false}.

verify_admin_action_500.root_cause: In routes/auth.py, verify_admin_action() passes context string from request body to create_pin_notification(). However, create_pin_notification() in notifications.py expects context to be a dict and calls context.get('type', 'pin_used') which fails with AttributeError: 'str' object has no attribute 'get'.
verify_admin_action_500.fix_applied: Added isinstance(context, str) check in create_pin_notification() that normalizes plain strings to {'type': 'admin_action', 'description': context}. This also fixes the same pattern in verify_manager_pin() endpoint.

sections: TestVerifyAdminAction (5 tests): POST /auth/verify-admin-action password + TOTP modes

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: create_pin_notification() in notifications.py expected dict context but auth.py endpoints passed string context → caused 500 on verify-admin-action with non-empty context string

verify_manager_pin() endpoint in auth.py has same pattern (line 103: await create_pin_notification(context, ...)) where context is a dict from request data - this ALSO needs the fix since users may pass string context. The fix in notifications.py handles both cases.
The PUT /settings/totp-controls endpoint is documented as POST in review_request but correctly implemented as PUT in both backend and frontend - minor doc discrepancy only
seed_data_creation: Multiple inventory corrections created for product P-8C287A5F (VITMIN PRO POWDER) at Main Branch - Downtown during testing. These are labeled TEST_* in reasons.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All TOTP and Inventory Correction features are working. One critical bug was found and fixed: POST /api/auth/verify-admin-action returned 500 when context was non-empty string (notifications.py type error). Fixed in notifications.py. Backend 27/27 pass. Product P-8C287A5F (VITMIN PRO POWDER) at Main Branch Downtown has multiple TEST_ correction history entries. TOTP is not configured (enabled=false) for owner user after our setup-but-not-verified tests. TOTP controls were saved with invoice_edit and product_delete enabled (from UI test) - may need to reset if needed.
